The Dog Liberator™ - Herding Breed Rescue, including Border Collie, Australian Shepherd (Aussie), Collie, Shetland Sheepdog (Sheltie), Catahoula, Farm Collie, and English Shepherd. Located in Central Florida, rescuing and fostering throughout the Southeast United States, including Orlando, Deltona, Tampa, Atlanta, Georgia, Miami, and Alabama. The Dog Liberator is a foster-based non-profit, 501c(3) charitable organization. All dogs are fostered in a home environment, which enables the dog to show its true color. Founded in 2009, The Dog Liberator has successfully rescued and adopted over 700 dogs. Help rescue and save a dog's life today, by donating.
